folders.description:
# Components

This directory contains reusable Astro components.

## Purpose
- Shared UI components
- Layout components
- Feature-specific components
- Component utilities

# Layouts

This directory contains layout components that define the application structure.

## Purpose
- Page layouts
- Base templates
- Layout components
- Responsive layouts

# Pages

This directory contains the application pages and routes.

## Purpose
- Page components
- Route definitions
- Page-specific logic
- Page metadata

# Services

This directory contains service-related functionality and API integrations.

## Purpose
- API clients
- HTTP requests
- External service integrations
- Data fetching utilities
- Service interfaces
- API response types

# API Services

This directory contains API endpoint-specific services.

## Purpose
- API endpoint implementations
- Service-specific logic
- API response handling
- API error handling

# HTTP Utilities

This directory contains HTTP-related utilities and configurations.

## Purpose
- Base HTTP client configuration
- Request/response interceptors
- Error handling utilities
- HTTP request helpers

# External Services

This directory contains external service integrations.

## Purpose
- Third-party service integrations
- External API clients
- Service-specific configurations
- External service utilities

# Service Types

This directory contains service-related TypeScript types.

## Purpose
- API response types
- Service interfaces
- Request/response types
- Service-specific type definitions

# Styles

This directory contains global styles and theme configurations.

## Purpose
- Global CSS
- Theme variables
- Style utilities
- Custom styles

# Utilities

This directory contains utility functions and helpers.

## Purpose
- Helper functions
- Constants
- Type definitions
- Shared utilities

# Hooks

This directory contains custom React hooks for interactive components.

## Purpose
- Custom hooks
- State management
- Side effects
- Event handlers

# Assets

This directory contains static assets used in the application.

## Purpose
- Images
- Icons
- Fonts
- Other static files

# Internationalization

This directory contains translation files and i18n configurations.

## Purpose
- Translation files
- Language configurations
- i18n utilities
- Locale data

# Configuration

This directory contains application configuration files.

## Purpose
- App configuration
- Feature flags
- Constants
- Configuration utilities

# Types

This directory contains TypeScript type definitions.

## Purpose
- Type definitions
- Interfaces
- Enums
- Type utilities
